title: DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER - 211info
text: CARNEGIE LIBRARY DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a drop-in day space to go inside out of the cold to warm up temporarily throughout the winter season. 302 Ferry Street SW Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Wednesday-Thursday 1pm-6pm, Friday-Saturday 10am-1pm. Closed on holidays. Email (541) 917-7585 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 917-7585 Main phone Main phone (541) 917-7585 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call ahead to confirm hours FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Linn County Services: Extreme Cold Warming Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CARNEGIE LIBRARY
